name: Contentful
hq: Berlin, Germany / San Francisco, CA (dual HQ)
one_liner: Contentful is a headless, API-first composable content management platform that enables enterprises to create, manage, and deliver digital experiences across any channel.

ambiguities: Total funding figures vary by source: Tracxn/Getlatka report $333M, PitchBook $339M, CBInsights $331M — $339M (PitchBook) used as best estimate.
HQ is ambiguous: company was originally founded in Berlin and lists dual HQ (Berlin + San Francisco/Denver); official about page and Wikipedia both reference both cities.
Headcount from Tracxn (1,022 as of Mar 2026) used; PitchBook shows 987, Getlatka shows 990 — figures are consistent in the ~990–1,022 range.
Series F valuation of $3B is as of July 2021 per Tracxn; no more recent post-money valuation found.
Tech stack reflects Contentful's own supported integrations/SDKs rather than internal engineering stack, as internal stack details were not publicly disclosed.
